title: EvilProxy Credential Harvest
subtitle: Detect reverse-proxy credential harvesting, MFA bypass, and session token theft

steps.title: EvilProxy Link Delivery
steps.description: Attacker sends phishing email with EvilProxy reverse proxy link mimicking Microsoft 365.

steps.title: AitM Session Interception
steps.description: Victim authenticates through proxy; credentials and session cookie captured in real time.

steps.title: MFA Push Bombing
steps.description: If MFA blocks, attacker sends rapid push notifications until victim approves.

steps.title: Anomalous Token Alert
steps.description: Sentinel detects anomalous token characteristics and multi-IP session.

steps.title: Session Replay
steps.description: Attacker replays stolen session from different location to access mailbox.

steps.title: Inbox Rule Creation
steps.description: Create forwarding rule to external address for persistent email access.

steps.title: Post-Phishing ATO Alert
steps.description: Post-compromise detection rules identify inbox rule manipulation.

steps.title: Session Revocation
steps.description: CLAW revokes all sessions, forces password reset, removes malicious rules.

steps.title: Phishing-Resistant MFA
steps.description: Deploy FIDO2/Windows Hello, disable push MFA for affected users.

steps.title: Phishing Awareness
steps.description: Targeted training and simulation for affected department.
